concept: Unblock Me is a sliding block puzzle game where the player's objective is to maneuver a designated red block out of a confined wooden grid by sliding other obstructing blocks. Blocks can only move along their fixed horizontal or vertical axis, requiring strategic planning to create an open path to the exit. The game features over 18,000 puzzles across "Relax" and "Challenge" modes, with difficulty progressively increasing as players advance through the extensive level packs. Controls are simple, involving tapping and dragging blocks to slide them within the grid. Progression is measured by solving puzzles, with daily rewards offering free hints to assist with challenging levels. Monetization primarily revolves around purchasing additional hints or a premium version for an ad-free experience and potentially more content.
name: Unblock Me
